name: "Terraform Plan & Apply"

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  id-token: write
  contents: read

env:
  SOURCE_DIR: ./dist
  BASE_URL: https://www.trinityklein.dev/
  TF_DIR: ./terraform

jobs:
  #################################################################
  # Convert all resources to terraform
  #################################################################
  terraform:
    name: terraform
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' 
      
    concurrency:
      group: terraform-${{ github.ref }}
      cancel-in-progress: true
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Terraform
        uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3
        with:
          terraform_version: "1.6.0"

      - name: Configure AWS credentials (OIDC)
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::${{ secrets.AWS_ACCOUNT_ID }}:role/GithubActionsDeployRole
          aws-region: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Terraform init
        run: terraform -chdir=terraform init -reconfigure 

      - name: Terraform validate
        run: terraform -chdir=terraform validate
      
      - name: Terraform force unlock
        run: terraform -chdir=terraform force-unlock -force ${{ secrets.TF_PID }}

      - name: Terraform plan
        id: plan
        run: terraform -chdir=terraform plan -var-file="terraform.tfvars" -out=tfplan

      - name: Upload terraform plan artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: tfplan
          path: terraform/tfplan

      - name: Terraform apply (main only)
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        run: terraform -chdir=terraform apply -auto-approve tfplan
      
      - name: Detect and kill Terraform processes
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Checking for any hung Terraform processes..."
          TF_PROCS=$(ps aux | grep '[t]erraform' || true)
          if [ -n "$TF_PROCS" ]; then
            echo "Found the following Terraform processes:"
            echo "$TF_PROCS"
            ps aux | grep '[t]erraform' | awk '{print $2}' | xargs -r sudo kill -9
            echo "All Terraform processes have been terminated."
          else
            echo "No stale Terraform processes found."
          fi
